view.block.description: Blocked accounts cannot reply in your threads, mention you, or otherwise interact with you. You will not see their content and they will be prevented from seeing yours.

view.list.moderation.description: Public, sharable lists of users to mute or block in bulk.
view.mute.description: Muted accounts have their posts removed from your feed and from your notifications. Mutes are completely private.
view.settings.updateLater: You can update this later from your settings.
view.starterPack.description: Starter Packs let you share your favorite feeds and people with your friends.
